project_type: Python FastAPI application - AI Document/Contract Intelligence Agent
build_system: pip with requirements.txt, Docker for containerization
verification_instructions:
1. Install dependencies: pip install -r requirements.txt
2. Run tests: python -m pytest tests/ -v
3. Start API: uvicorn api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
4. Check health endpoint: curl http://localhost:8000/health
setup_instructions:
1. pyenv shell 3.11.14
2. pip install -r requirements.txt
3. Copy .env.example to .env and configure API keys
4. Run: uvicorn api.main:app --reload
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access to PyPI, Docker Hub, and external APIs. Python 3.11.14 available via pyenv.
contribution_requirements: Greenfield project - establishing conventions with this implementation
key_patterns: FastAPI for REST API, Pydantic models for data validation, async/await for batch processing, ABC base classes for extractor interface, YAML for configuration, SQLite for audit/metadata storage
directory_structure:
ai-new-2/
  src/ - Main source code
    agent/ - Orchestrator and action engine
    extractors/ - Three extraction modes (local, API, hybrid)
    processors/ - Document format processors (PDF, image, DOCX, OCR)
    models/ - Pydantic data models
    industry/ - Enterprise features (contracts, invoices, compliance, PII, classification, version comparison)
    batch/ - Batch processing with progress tracking
    utils/ - Config, audit, webhooks, file utilities
  api/ - FastAPI REST API layer
    routes/ - API route modules
  config/ - YAML configuration files
  tests/ - pytest test suite with sample documents
